_comment: Reporting entity codes supervised by the MLRO. Every generated artefact that mentions an entity uses the matching code. Asana project names are matched against these codes (word-boundary, case-insensitive) so a project named 'FB Compliance' or 'FB - Screenings' is classified as entity FB. Projects that do not match any code are classified as UNASSIGNED and the MLRO is asked to rename them or populate the projects list below with exact project names.
